name: MechaCap Arena
short_description: Become the MechaCap Champion! Build MechaCap bots, pilot them and fight in the arena in this whimsical sporepunk fantasy robot fighting game! Experiment with different attachments that alter your playstyle, meet a cast of quirky characters and experience arenas across four different towns.
detailed_description:
Become the MechaCap Champion!

Take on the role of a fledgling MechaCap pilot that sets out to become the national MechaCap Champion!

Meet a cast of quirky characters and experience arenas across four different towns.

Build!

Assemble unique MechaCap bots from a variety of color schemes and attachments that alter your playstyle.

Compete!

Bring your MechaCap to the arenas and clean, fight and race your way to victory!

Play with up to 4 friends in Battle Mode!

Connect your gamepads and play locally - or invite Steam friends to play online via Remote Play Together!

Features

  • Build and tinker with your MechaCaps

  • Clean, race and fight in arenas across 4 different towns

  • Follow a light but heartfelt story with a quirky cast of characters

  • Personalize your MechaCap with different attachments and colour schemes

  • Face off against your friends in up to 4 players in Battle Mode

reviews.review_text: So much fun! Really fun mech fighting gameplay, I was sooo bad at the controls, but the missions to clean got me learning superfast. Super cute art, and I got invested in the story. The audio was pretty solid with the VO fitting the art style. Can't wait to try playing this with my friends. I ran into some minor issues/glitches, but nothing game breaking. Two thumbs up! ♥

Very nice robot fighting games. Commands can be tough at the beginning, but after a bunch of fights, you easily get the grip of the mechanics and then the fun begin. Physics is simple, but super fun to play with. 
Love the art style and sfx, they really sell the atmosphere. 
Arenas and robots designs are simple, yet very well executed, so they give you the "let's just have one more fight" effect, which is great.
Huge plus, it has a 4 players couch coop, which is unfortunately rare these days, so you get to have fun smashing your friends.

Fun little game! I really like the character design and the different challenges besides fighting, my favorite are the robot races. It’s also a good time to experiment with different weapons and end up in quirky fights, ending with unexpected outcomes!
The battle mode is super fun too, especially with multiple players!
